# Auto-Encoding Variational Bayes (VAE)

## Project Overview

This project reproduces key results from the paper:

"Auto-Encoding Variational Bayes"
Kingma & Welling (2013)

The implementation uses a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) trained on the MNIST dataset.

## Features

- VAE Architecture
- Reparameterization Trick
- ELBO Loss Function
- MNIST Training
- Reconstruction Results
- Digit Generation
- Latent Space Visualization
- Training Loss Analysis

## Files

- vae.py : VAE model
- train.py : Training script
- reconstruct.py : Reconstruction experiment
- generate.py : Generate new digits
- latent_space.py : Latent space visualization
